name: Security Review
description: Audit code for security vulnerabilities including injection, path traversal, secret exposure, and auth bypass.
checklist: Check all routes for requireAuth middleware
Scan for process.env.SECRET or API key exposure in responses
Verify safeResolve() used for all path operations
Check for command injection in shell calls
Verify no SQL injection in raw query strings
Check for path traversal via ../ in user input
Verify no user-controlled data reaches eval() or exec()
Ensure rate limiting applied to auth endpoints
example_tasks: Audit new backlog endpoint for missing auth
Check if user-supplied paths are sanitized before file access
Scan for hardcoded secrets in new config files
common_failure_modes: Environment variable logged or returned in API response
User input passed directly to shell command
output_format: Structured findings list: { severity, location, issue, fix }
